name: Roberto Andrés Terán Flores
intro: Economist and researcher specializing in macroeconomic and financial analysis, data modeling, economic projections, and process automation.
about: Economista con experiencia en análisis macroeconómico, automatización de bases de datos y desarrollo de modelos econométricos aplicados.

papers.authors: Bolivar, O., Huanto, C. & Teran, R.
papers.title: Inflation Expectations: Dynamics and Effects for South America
